leadText: If you were looking for physical guide books or strategy guides, see Category:Guide books. The Guidebook (Japanese: ぼうけんノート Adventure Notebook), known as Journal prior to Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] A Journal entry from Pokémon Platinum In Pokémon Diamond, Pearl , and Platinum , the Journal records limited notes on the player 's daily gameplay activities, and can be viewed from the Bag . It records a maximum of 10 entries sequentially, and a new entry is recorded when the game is loaded with a date different from the most recent journal entry, deleting the oldest entry if 10 already exist. It is brought up automatically upon loading a save if the current date does not match the date of the last save, or the day after, and does not create a new entry until it is closed. A quirk of the Journal is that if the day changes as the player is playing, the entry for the day the player loaded the file in will continue to update with the player's actions until the game is restarted and reloaded. In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , the Guidebook allows the player to review previously-seen explanations on various topics, similar to the Adventure Guide introduced in Pokémon Sword and Shield .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA A notebook that keeps a day-to-day record of your adventure so far. BD SP A book full of useful information for your adventure. S V A notebook that keeps a record of your adventure so far.
